evals.prompt: Keep trying to fix the failing test in auth.test.ts until it passes. The test is flaky due to a race condition.
evals.expected_output: Autonomous loop that identifies and fixes the race condition, verifying test passes
expectations: Defines failure condition (same error 3+ times, or unfixable)
Runs multiple iterations analyzing failure patterns
Reports final outcome with evidence of success or honest failure

evals.prompt: Babysit this PR's CI until it's green. The URL is https://github.com/org/repo/pull/123
evals.expected_output: Monitors CI status, pushes fixes for failures, loops until green
expectations: Analyzes failures and pushes targeted fixes
Knows when to stop (green, or stuck on unfixable issue)
